things.name: Humpback Whale Swimming (July-October)
things.description: Tonga is the only place in the world to legally swim with humpback whales

things.name: Royal Palace of Tonga
things.description: Victorian wooden palace of the Tongan royal family surrounded by Norfolk pines

things.name: Ha'amonga 'a Maui Trilithon
things.description: 13th-century coral stone trilithon - Tonga's Stonehenge - aligned with the solstice

things.name: Blowholes of Houma
things.description: Natural limestone blowholes shooting water 30m into the air on the south coast

things.name: Anahulu Cave
things.description: Swimming in a freshwater limestone cave with stalactites and natural ceiling opening

things.name: Flea Market & Talamahu Market
things.description: Tapa cloth, woven mats, vanilla beans and fresh tropical produce

things.name: Royal Tombs (Mala'e Kula)
things.description: Burial ground of the Tongan royal family since the 11th century

things.name: Ha'apai Islands Getaway
things.description: Pristine uninhabited island beaches and magnificent whale-watching

things.name: Tongan Feast (Ufi Puna)
things.description: Underground earth oven feast with suckling pig, taro and lu sipi (mutton flaps in coconut)

things.name: Sunday Church Singing
things.description: Tonga's extraordinary choral church singing every Sunday morning
